headline: Assessing Citigroup (C) Valuation After Morgan Stanley Endorsement And Profitability Push
summary: Morgan Stanley’s recent endorsement of Citigroup (C) has put the bank back in focus for many investors, with attention centering on its profitability targets, cost reduction efforts, and potential shifts in market share. See our latest analysis for Citigroup. Citigroup’s share price has eased in the past month, with a 30 day share price return of a 4.28% decline and a year to date share price return of a 6.69% decline. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of 57.07% and 3 year total...
